name: Priya Sharma
review: Absolutely stunning bridal mehndi! Niraj ji was so patient and professional. Everyone loved the design on my wedding day. Highly recommended for all brides in Mathura!

name: Neha Gupta
review: Best mehndi artist in Mathura! The arabic design was exactly what I wanted. She was on time and the mehndi color came out so dark and beautiful.

name: Anjali Patel
review: Niraj ji did mehndi for my entire family for my sister's wedding. Each design was unique and beautiful. True artist! Very reasonable prices too.
